hero.subheadline: An AI platform that automatically replies to customer messages, creates content, and protects your Google reputation — 24/7.

trustedBy.title: Trusted by restaurants, clinics, cafés, and stores...

items.title: Unanswered Messages at Night
items.desc: Customers message after hours and no one replies

items.title: Repetitive Questions Drain You
items.desc: Same questions every day exhaust you and your team

items.title: Negative Reviews Without Response
items.desc: One unanswered negative review hurts your business

items.title: Channels Scattered Everywhere
items.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook — impossible to track all

items.title: Unified Inbox
items.desc: All messages from every channel in one place. Track conversations without switching apps.

items.title: Reply in Your Voice
items.desc: AI learns your style and replies exactly as you would.

items.title: Before They Complain
items.desc: Detects unhappy customers and reaches out before they leave a bad review.

items.title: Auto Content Engine
items.desc: Generates daily social media content tailored to your business — effortlessly.

items.title: Keyword Hunter
items.desc: Monitors conversations needing human attention and alerts you instantly.

items.title: Smart Weekly Report
items.desc: Comprehensive weekly report on reply performance, customer satisfaction, and growth opportunities.

steps.title: Sign Up & Connect
steps.desc: Connect your channels in under 3 minutes — Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, Gmail, and more.

steps.title: Define Your Business
steps.desc: Tell the AI about your business, your tone, and your frequently asked questions.

steps.title: Sleep Peacefully
steps.desc: The AI replies to customers, posts your content, and protects your reputation — automatically.

items.name: Ahmed Al-Salem
items.quote: After Naz, our replies became instant even while sleeping. Customers noticed and our ratings improved significantly.

items.name: Sara Al-Mutairi
items.quote: I used to waste hours daily answering the same questions. Now AI handles everything and I focus on my work.

items.name: Mohammed Al-Zahrani
items.quote: The Before They Complain system saved me multiple times. I now know about an issue before they leave a bad review.

items.q: Do I need technical experience to use Naz?
items.a: Not at all. Naz is designed to be easy for any business owner. Setup takes less than 10 minutes.

items.q: Will AI reply for me or suggest replies?
items.a: You can choose both modes — fully automatic replies or suggested replies for you to review and approve.
Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, Gmail, TikTok, and X (Twitter). Coming soon: Snapchat and Telegram.
Yes. We use end-to-end SSL encryption and your data is never shared with any third party.
Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no additional fees.
Yes! All plans come with a 14-day full free trial with no credit card required.

footer.tagline: The AI Employee That Never Sleeps
